title: El and L's Dye CTM
description: Adds Connected Textures (CTM) support for some blocks from the El and L's Dye Mod.
body:
# El and L's Dye CTM

This resource pack adds Connected Textures (CTM) support for stained glass and stained glass panes from the **[El and L's Dye Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/el-and-ls-dye-mod)**, making them blend seamlessly.

To see the connected textures in action, you’ll need **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** or [**OptiFine**](https://optifine.net/home) (are you still using OptiFine in 2025?).

![Periwinkle Stained Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17049674b27e9c5455dca4f140dd9a03cc297dfd.png)

Enjoy a better-looking glass experience with full CTM support!
